contentBlocks.title: How to convert PNG to PDF

items.title: Upload your PNG file
items.description: Drag and drop your PNG file onto the converter or click to browse.

items.title: Convert
items.description: Click Convert — files are processed locally in your browser.

items.title: Complete privacy
items.description: Your files are processed entirely in your browser. Nothing is uploaded to any server.

items.title: No limits
items.description: Convert as many files as you need. No daily limits, no file size restrictions, no watermarks.

items.title: Quality control
items.description: Adjust settings to find the perfect balance between file size and quality.

items.title: Instant conversion
items.description: All processing happens locally using modern browser APIs — fast and works offline after loading.

contentBlocks.title: Frequently asked questions about PNG to PDF conversion

items.question: Is converting PNG to PDF free?
items.answer: Yes, this converter is completely free with no limits. No registration, no watermarks.

items.question: Does the converter upload my files?
items.answer: No. All processing happens locally in your browser. Your files never leave your device.

items.question: Can I convert multiple files at once?
items.answer: Yes, the converter supports batch conversion. Add multiple files and convert them all simultaneously.

items.question: Does the converter work on mobile?
items.answer: Yes, the converter works on any device with a modern web browser, including smartphones and tablets.
